# Advanced Visualization and Scientific Communication {#sec-advanced-viz}

```{r setup}
#| include: false
#| eval: true
source(here::here("R/functions.R"))
source(here::here("R/load-packages.R"))
```

## Introduction

This session explores advanced visualization techniques for research.
We focus on publication-quality plots, layered grammars, and visual
strategies for communicating scientific results.

## Learning outcomes

- Build layered and faceted plots with `ggplot2`.
- Apply themes and annotation for scientific publication.
- Convey uncertainty and clinical trends clearly.
